message:
fix: route wisp lookups through wisps table in storage functions (bd-w2w)

Multiple storage functions hardcoded queries to the issues table, missing
wisps stored in the wisps table. This caused failures when molecules,
dependencies, or blocked-ID computations involved wisp IDs.

Fixed functions:
- GetMoleculeProgress: query wisps/wisp_dependencies for wisp molecules
- AddDependency: check wisps table for target existence (pre-tx to avoid deadlock)
- GetBlockedIssues: scan both issues and wisps for active IDs
- computeBlockedIDs: scan both tables for active IDs, deps, children, closed status
- GetEpicsEligibleForClosure: check both tables for child statuses
- Transaction SearchIssues: route all-ephemeral ID filters to wisps table

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
